transcript: Speaker A: Tired of brainrot games? Learn chess with me, instead. Capture my rook, and I lose 5 points of material. Nicely done! The rook is equivalent to 5 pawns. Capture my queen, and I lose 9 points of material. Amazing! The queen is worth 9 pawns. Now, capture the most valuable piece possible. Perfect lesson!

summary: The ad positions Duolingo's chess lessons as a productive alternative to mindless mobile games. It showcases a gamified puzzle teaching the point values of chess pieces. The video ends with a call to download the Duolingo app.
